title: Adult mouse thymus dissociation (on ice)

","mol_weight":0,"sku":"","url":"","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":1,"name":"Contributed by users","link":"https://www.protocols.io","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/1.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/1.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Quickly isolate thymus and immerse in ice-cold PBS.
Place thymus on petri dish on ice using sterile forceps.
Remove red regions rich in red blood cells using razorblade.
Using razor blade, mince whole thymus on petri dish, on ice 2 min until fine paste. 00:02:00, Mincing
Weigh out 12.5 mg tissue on petri dish.
Using razor blade, place tissue in 1.5 mL tube containing 0.5 mL digest mix (1 mg/mL) on ice. undetermined, Digest mix (1 mg/mL)
Shake every 30 seconds to re-suspend tissue for 2 minutes. 00:02:00, Re-suspending 00:00:30, Shake
At 2 min, triturate gently 10X using 1 mL pipet set to 400 μL.
For 3 additional minutes (5 min total time), every minute remove tube and triturate gently 10X using 1 mL pipet set to 400 μL. 00:03:00, Digest on ice 00:01:00, Remove tube and triturate gently 10X
Let tissue chunks settle for 1 min on ice. 00:01:00, On ice

At 6 mins total time, remove 80% (400 µL) of supernatant consisting of dissociated cells (leaving undissociated tissue chunks at the bottom of the tube) and apply to 30 μM filter on sterile 50 mL conical- rinse filter with 6 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. Save 50 mL conical and filter for next steps. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%
Add additional 0.5 mL enzyme mix (2 mg/mL) to residual tissue chunks in 1.5 mL tube. undetermined, Enzyme mix (2 mg/mL)
For 6 additional min (12 min. total), continue triturating gently (10x) every minute on ice. 00:06:00, Digest 00:01:00, Triturate gently (10x)
After 12 min. total digest time, triturate digest mix 10X and transfer to 30 μM filter (the same tube/filter as used previously).
Rinse filter with 6 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%
Transfer flow-through to 15 mL conical and spin down 650 G for 5 minutes at 4° C. Undetermined, Spin down 00:05:00, Spin down
Remove supernatant and re-suspend in 1 mL total volume PBS/BSA 0.04% in a 1.5 mL tube. undetermined, PBS/BSA 0.04%
Spin 610 G for 5 minutes at 4 °C. 00:05:00, Spinning Undetermined
Remove supernatant and re-suspend in 1 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%
Determine cell yield and viability using hemocytometer with trypan blue. Adjust concentration to 1,000 cells / µL for 10x Chromium or 100 cells / µL for DropSeq.
creator: Andrew Potter
